description_long: This is a rectangular wooden storage box with a natural wood grain finish and a sturdy, open-top design. The box features a prominent horizontal handle that spans the length of the top, supported by two thick vertical end panels. The sides and base are constructed from slatted wooden planks, providing both structural integrity and a classic, rustic appearance. The end panels are slightly rounded at the top, with visible joinery details that suggest robust craftsmanship. There are no visible lids, locks, or additional compartments, making the interior easily accessible. This type of box is commonly used for carrying tools, gardening supplies, or other miscellaneous items in urban garages, workshops, or outdoor settings.
description: A sturdy, open-top wooden storage box with a horizontal handle and slatted sides, finished in a natural wood grain. Ideal for carrying or storing tools and supplies.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top, horizontal handle, and slatted wooden front panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, rounded end panel and the attachment point of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the open top and slatted wooden back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other end panel with rounded top and handle attachment.
